recommendations.title: Blue Lagoon: The Awakening
recommendations.overview: Two high school students become stranded on a tropical island and must rely on each other for survival. They learn more about themselves and each other while falling in love.

recommendations.title: Big Driver
recommendations.overview: Tess Thorne, a famous writer, is determined to seek revenge on the man who brutally assaulted and raped her on a desolate New England road.

recommendations.title: Fallen
recommendations.overview: For high schooler Aaron Corbett, turning 18 means becoming not just a man but a nephilim, too -- half human, half angel, with supernatural abilities.

recommendations.title: The Lost Future
recommendations.overview: A group of post-apocalyptic survivors, struggle to survive in a world where jungles and forests and primeval wetlands and deserts have obliterated civilization. They staunchly face genetically mutating beasts and mysterious diseases in an attempt to

recommendations.title: Freezer
recommendations.overview: New York city mechanic Robert Saunders is knocked unconscious at his birthday dinner by Russian thugs and wakes up to find himself locked inside the restaurant's industrial freezer. This ruthless gang demand he return the $8 million he has stolen fro

recommendations.title: Transit
recommendations.overview: Nate takes his family for a camping trip to reconnect. When they pull off at a rest stop, a gang of thieves hides their stash from an armored car robbery among the family belongings. They soon find themselves on the run and the gang will stop at noth

recommendations.title: Kansas City Confidential
recommendations.overview: An ex-convict sets out to uncover who framed him for an armored car robbery.

recommendations.title: Overhaul
recommendations.overview: When truck racer Roger loses everything, he receives a tempting but dangerous offer: to work as the getaway driver for a gang of thieves.

recommendations.title: The Shadow's Edge
recommendations.overview: Macau Police brings the tracking expert police officer out of retirement to help catch a dangerous group of professional thieves.

recommendations.title: Firestorm
recommendations.overview: Hong Kong. When Cao Nan and his group of thieves rob an armored car in broad daylight, they don't hesitate to murder innocent people on the run. Lui Ming Chit, a veteran police inspector, is forced to use sinister tactics to catch them.
